name: openproblems_v1/tnbc_wu2021
label: Triple-Negative Breast Cancer
summary: 1535 cells from six fresh triple-negative breast cancer tumors.
description: 1535 cells from six TNBC donors by (Wu et al., 2021). This dataset includes cytokine activities, inferred using a multivariate linear model with cytokine-focused signatures, as assumed true cell-cell communication (Dimitrov et al., 2022).

name: openproblems_v1/immune_cells
label: Human immune
summary: Human immune cells dataset from the scIB benchmarks
description: Human immune cells from peripheral blood and bone marrow taken from 5 datasets comprising 10 batches across technologies (10X, Smart-seq2).

name: openproblems_v1/pancreas
label: Human pancreas
summary: Human pancreas cells dataset from the scIB benchmarks
description: Human pancreatic islet scRNA-seq data from 6 datasets across technologies (CEL-seq, CEL-seq2, Smart-seq2, inDrop, Fluidigm C1, and SMARTER-seq).

name: openproblems_v1/allen_brain_atlas
label: Mouse Brain Atlas
description: A murine brain atlas with adjacent cell types as assumed benchmark truth, inferred from deconvolution proportion correlations using matching 10x Visium slides (see Dimitrov et al., 2022).

name: openproblems_v1/cengen
label: CeNGEN
summary: Complete Gene Expression Map of an Entire Nervous System
description: 100k FACS-isolated C. elegans neurons from 17 experiments sequenced on 10x Genomics.

name: openproblems_v1/mouse_hspc_nestorowa2016
label: Mouse HSPC
summary: Haematopoeitic stem and progenitor cells from mouse bone marrow
description: 1656 hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells from mouse bone marrow. Sequenced by Smart-seq2.

name: openproblems_v1/zebrafish
label: Zebrafish embryonic cells
summary: Single-cell mRNA sequencing of zebrafish embryonic cells.
description: 90k cells from zebrafish embryos throughout the first day of development, with and without a knockout of chordin, an important developmental gene.

name: openproblems_v1/mouse_blood_olsson_labelled
label: Mouse myeloid
summary: Myeloid lineage differentiation from mouse blood
description: 660 FACS-isolated myeloid cells from 9 experiments sequenced using C1 Fluidigm and SMARTseq in 2016 by Olsson et al.
